name: @authfly/core
description: AuthFly AuthKit TypeScript core: provider-agnostic flow contracts, localized error catalog, and a DOM controller for embedding self-hosted authentication widgets.

scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run build:types && bun run build:esm && bun run build:umd
scripts.build:esm: mkdir -p dist/esm && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist/esm --format esm --minify --sourcemap=external && mv dist/esm/index.js dist/authfly-authkit.esm.js && mv dist/esm/index.js.map dist/authfly-authkit.esm.js.map && rmdir dist/esm
scripts.build:umd: mkdir -p dist/umd && bun build src/umd.ts --outdir dist/umd --format iife --global-name=Authfly --target browser --minify --sourcemap=external && mv dist/umd/umd.js dist/authfly-authkit.umd.js && mv dist/umd/umd.js.map dist/authfly-authkit.umd.js.map && rmdir dist/umd
